---
title: "EPA progress"
output: html_document
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

##  Site 0034
```{r}
# Load required library
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Step 1: Read in Site 0034 
df_0034 <- read_csv("epa_pm25_site_0034.csv")

# Preview structure
glimpse(df_0034)

# Select only 24-hour data
df_0034_24hr <- df_0034 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0034F = sample_measurement)

# Preview
head(df_0034_24hr)

# Average duplicate entries by date
df_0034_24hr <- df_0034_24hr %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0034F = mean(PM25_0034F, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Select only 1-hour data
df_0034_1hr <- df_0034 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "1 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, time_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0034H = sample_measurement)

head(df_0034_1hr)

# Daily averages from the 1-hour data
df_0034_1hr_avg <- df_0034_1hr %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0034H = mean(PM25_0034H, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

```

## Site 0038
```{r}
# Load required library
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Step 1: Read in Site 0038
df_0038 <- read_csv("epa_pm25_site_0038.csv")

# Preview structure
glimpse(df_0038)

# Filter only 24-hour data
df_0038_24hr <- df_0038 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0038F = sample_measurement)

# Preview
head(df_0038_24hr)

# Average duplicate entries by date
df_0038_24hr <- df_0038 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0038F = sample_measurement) %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0038F = mean(PM25_0038F, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Filter only 1-hour data
df_0038_1hr <- df_0038 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "1 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, time_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0038H = sample_measurement)

head(df_0038_1hr)

# Daily averages from the 1-hour data
df_0038_1hr_avg <- df_0038_1hr %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0038H = mean(PM25_0038H, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
```


## Site 0045
```{r}

# Load required library
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Read in Site 0045
df_0045 <- read_csv("epa_pm25_site_0045.csv")

# Preview structure
glimpse(df_0045)

# Filter only 24-hour data
df_0045_24hr <- df_0045 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0045F = sample_measurement)

head(df_0045_24hr)

# Average duplicate entries by date
df_0045_24hr <- df_0045 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0045F = sample_measurement) %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0045F = mean(PM25_0045F, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Filter only 1-hour data
df_0045_1hr <- df_0045 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "1 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, time_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0045H = sample_measurement)

head(df_0045_1hr)

# Daily averages from the 1-hour data
df_0045_1hr_avg <- df_0045_1hr %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0045H = mean(PM25_0045H, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
```


## Site 0060
```{r}
# Load required library
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Step 1: Read in Site 0060 separately
df_0060 <- read_csv("epa_pm25_site_0060.csv")

# Preview structure
glimpse(df_0060)

# Filter only 24-hour data
df_0060_24hr <- df_0060 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0060F = sample_measurement)

head(df_0060_24hr)

# Average duplicate entries by date
df_0060_24hr <- df_0060 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0060F = sample_measurement) %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0060F = mean(PM25_0060F, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Filter only 1-hour data
df_0060_1hr <- df_0060 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "1 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, time_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0060H = sample_measurement)

head(df_0060_1hr)

# Daily averages from the 1-hour data
df_0060_1hr_avg <- df_0060_1hr %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0060H = mean(PM25_0060H, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
```

## Site 0065
```{r}
# Load required library
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Step 1: Read in Site 0065 separately
df_0065 <- read_csv("epa_pm25_site_0065.csv")

# Preview structure
glimpse(df_0065)

# Filter only 24-hour data
df_0065_24hr <- df_0065 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0065F = sample_measurement)

head(df_0065_24hr)

# Average duplicate entries by date

df_0065_24hr <- df_0065 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0065F = sample_measurement) %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0065F = mean(PM25_0065F, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Filter only 1-hour data
df_0065_1hr <- df_0065 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "1 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, time_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0065H = sample_measurement)

head(df_0065_1hr)

# Daily averages from the 1-hour data
df_0065_1hr_avg <- df_0065_1hr %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0065H = mean(PM25_0065H, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
```

## Site 0073
```{r}
# Load required library
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# Read in Site 0073
df_0073 <- read_csv("epa_pm25_site_0073.csv")

# Preview structure
glimpse(df_0073)

# Filter only 24-hour data
df_0073_24hr <- df_0073 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0073F = sample_measurement)

head(df_0073_24hr)

# Average duplicate entries by date

df_0073_24hr <- df_0073 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "24 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0073F = sample_measurement) %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0073F = mean(PM25_0073F, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

# Filter only 1-hour data
df_0073_1hr <- df_0073 %>%
  filter(sample_duration == "1 HOUR") %>%
  select(date_local, time_local, sample_measurement) %>%
  rename(PM25_0073H = sample_measurement)

head(df_0073_1hr)

# Daily averages from the 1-hour data
df_0073_1hr_avg <- df_0073_1hr %>%
  group_by(date_local) %>%
  summarise(PM25_0073H = mean(PM25_0073H, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")


```

## Combine all 24-hour dataframes into one master dataframe by date
```{r}
library(purrr)
library(purrr)  # <-- add this if not already loaded

df_filter_all <- reduce(
  list(df_0034_24hr, df_0038_24hr, df_0045_24hr, df_0060_24hr, df_0065_24hr, df_0073_24hr),
  full_join,
  by = "date_local"
)

head(df_filter_all)
```

## Combine all 1-hour dataframes into one dataframe by date
```{r}
df_hourly_all <- reduce(
  list(df_0034_1hr_avg, df_0038_1hr_avg, df_0045_1hr_avg, df_0060_1hr_avg, df_0065_1hr_avg, df_0073_1hr_avg),
  full_join,
  by = "date_local"
)

head(df_hourly_all)
```

# list of all dates
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(purrr)

# Replace with the actual full date range in your data
all_dates <- tibble(date_local = seq.Date(
  from = as.Date("2024-11-01"),
  to = as.Date("2025-05-31"),
  by = "day"
))

# Site 0034
df_0034_24hr_full <- left_join(all_dates, df_0034_24hr, by = "date_local")
df_0034_1hr_full  <- left_join(all_dates, df_0034_1hr,  by = "date_local")

# Site 0038
df_0038_24hr_full <- left_join(all_dates, df_0038_24hr, by = "date_local")
df_0038_1hr_full  <- left_join(all_dates, df_0038_1hr,  by = "date_local")

# Site 0045
df_0045_24hr_full <- left_join(all_dates, df_0045_24hr, by = "date_local")
df_0045_1hr_full  <- left_join(all_dates, df_0045_1hr,  by = "date_local")

# Site 0060
df_0060_24hr_full <- left_join(all_dates, df_0060_24hr, by = "date_local")
df_0060_1hr_full  <- left_join(all_dates, df_0060_1hr,  by = "date_local")

# Site 0065
df_0065_24hr_full <- left_join(all_dates, df_0065_24hr, by = "date_local")
df_0065_1hr_full  <- left_join(all_dates, df_0065_1hr,  by = "date_local")

# Site 0073
df_0073_24hr_full <- left_join(all_dates, df_0073_24hr, by = "date_local")
df_0073_1hr_full  <- left_join(all_dates, df_0073_1hr,  by = "date_local")


```

#

```{r}

library(dplyr)

df_combined <- all_dates %>%
  left_join(df_0034_24hr,    by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0034_1hr_avg, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0038_24hr,    by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0038_1hr_avg, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0045_24hr,    by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0045_1hr_avg, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0060_24hr,    by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0060_1hr_avg, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0065_24hr,    by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0065_1hr_avg, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0073_24hr,    by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0073_1hr_avg, by = "date_local")

# result
glimpse(df_combined)
summary(df_combined)
  
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# Plot for Site 0034
ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0034F, y = PM25_0034H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Site 0034: Filter vs. Hourly Average PM2.5",
    x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)",
    y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)"
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0034F, df_combined$PM25_0034H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0034F, df_combined$PM25_0034H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  theme_minimal()

# Plot for Site 0038
ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0038F, y = PM25_0038H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Site 0038: Filter vs. Hourly Average PM2.5",
    x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)",
    y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)"
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0038F, df_combined$PM25_0038H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0038F, df_combined$PM25_0038H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  theme_minimal()

# Plot for Site 0045
ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0045F, y = PM25_0045H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Site 0045: Filter vs. Hourly Average PM2.5",
    x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)",
    y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)"
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0045F, df_combined$PM25_0045H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0045F, df_combined$PM25_0045H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  theme_minimal()

# Plot for Site 0060
ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0060F, y = PM25_0060H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Site 0060: Filter vs. Hourly Average PM2.5",
    x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)",
    y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)"
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0060F, df_combined$PM25_0060H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0060F, df_combined$PM25_0060H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  theme_minimal()

# Plot for Site 0065
ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0065F, y = PM25_0065H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Site 0065: Filter vs. Hourly Average PM2.5",
    x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)",
    y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)"
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0065F, df_combined$PM25_0065H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0065F, df_combined$PM25_0065H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  theme_minimal()

# Plot for Site 0073
ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0073F, y = PM25_0073H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Site 0073: Filter vs. Hourly Average PM2.5",
    x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)",
    y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)"
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0073F, df_combined$PM25_0073H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0073F, df_combined$PM25_0073H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

# Calculate R² for Site 0034
r_squared_0034 <- summary(lm(PM25_0034H ~ PM25_0034F, data = df_combined))$r.squared

ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0034F, y = PM25_0034H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Site 0034: Filter vs. Hourly Avg PM2.5 (R² = ", round(r_squared_0034, 2), ")"),
    x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)",
    y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)"
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0034F, df_combined$PM25_0034H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0034F, df_combined$PM25_0034H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  theme_minimal()

# Calculate R² for Site 0038
r_squared_0038 <- summary(lm(PM25_0038H ~ PM25_0038F, data = df_combined))$r.squared

ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0038F, y = PM25_0038H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Site 0038: Filter vs. Hourly Avg PM2.5 (R² = ", round(r_squared_0038, 2), ")"),
    x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)",
    y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)"
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0038F, df_combined$PM25_0038H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0038F, df_combined$PM25_0038H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  theme_minimal()

# Calculate R² for Site 0045
r_squared_0045 <- summary(lm(PM25_0045H ~ PM25_0045F, data = df_combined))$r.squared

ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0045F, y = PM25_0045H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Site 0045: Filter vs. Hourly Avg PM2.5 (R² = ", round(r_squared_0045, 2), ")"),
    x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)",
    y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)"
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0045F, df_combined$PM25_0045H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0045F, df_combined$PM25_0045H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  theme_minimal()

# Calculate R² for Site 0060
r_squared_0060 <- summary(lm(PM25_0060H ~ PM25_0060F, data = df_combined))$r.squared

ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0060F, y = PM25_0060H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Site 0060: Filter vs. Hourly Avg PM2.5 (R² = ", round(r_squared_0060, 2), ")"),
    x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)",
    y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)"
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0060F, df_combined$PM25_0060H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0060F, df_combined$PM25_0060H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  theme_minimal()

# Calculate R² for Site 0065
r_squared_0065 <- summary(lm(PM25_0065H ~ PM25_0065F, data = df_combined))$r.squared

ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0065F, y = PM25_0065H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Site 0065: Filter vs. Hourly Avg PM2.5 (R² = ", round(r_squared_0065, 2), ")"),
    x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)",
    y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)"
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0065F, df_combined$PM25_0065H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0065F, df_combined$PM25_0065H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  theme_minimal()

# Calculate R² for Site 0073
r_squared_0073 <- summary(lm(PM25_0073H ~ PM25_0073F, data = df_combined))$r.squared

ggplot(df_combined, aes(x = PM25_0073F, y = PM25_0073H)) +
  geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Site 0073: Hourly Avg PM2.5  vs. Filter (R² = ", round(r_squared_0073, 2), ")"),
    x = "24-Hour Filter PM2.5 (µg/m³)",
    y = "Daily Avg of Hourly PM2.5 (µg/m³)"
  ) +
  coord_fixed() +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0073F, df_combined$PM25_0073H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(df_combined$PM25_0073F, df_combined$PM25_0073H, na.rm = TRUE))) +
  theme_minimal()

```

```{r}
# Combine all 24-hour filter data
df_combined_24hr <- all_dates %>%
  left_join(df_0034_24hr, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0038_24hr, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0045_24hr, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0060_24hr, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0065_24hr, by = "date_local") %>%
  left_join(df_0073_24hr, by = "date_local")
```


```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)

# Step 1: Get only filter PM columns
filter_columns <- names(df_combined_24hr)[str_detect(names(df_combined_24hr), "_F")]

# Step 2: All unique site pairs (including self-pairs)
site_pairs <- expand.grid(Site1 = filter_columns, Site2 = filter_columns, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  filter(Site1 <= Site2)

# Step 3: R2 calculation function
get_r2 <- function(col1, col2, data) {
  df_pair <- data %>%
    select(all_of(c(col1, col2))) %>%
    drop_na()
  if (nrow(df_pair) < 2) return(NA)
  summary(lm(df_pair[[col2]] ~ df_pair[[col1]]))$r.squared
}

# Step 4: Compute R2 values for all pairs
r2_table <- map2_dfr(site_pairs$Site1, site_pairs$Site2, function(c1, c2) {
  tibble(
    Site1 = str_remove(c1, "PM25_") %>% str_remove("F"),
    Site2 = str_remove(c2, "PM25_") %>% str_remove("F"),
    R2 = get_r2(c1, c2, df_combined_24hr)
  )
})

# Step 5: Merge with distance data
r2_with_distance <- left_join(r2_table, site_distances, by = c("Site1", "Site2"))

# View final merged table
print(r2_with_distance)

```





```{r}
# Load libraries
library(dplyr)
library(geosphere)  # For distHaversine
library(tidyr)

# Create a dataframe with site IDs and their coordinates
site_coords <- data.frame(
  Site = c("0034", "0038", "0045", "0060", "0065", "0073"),
  Latitude = c(mean(df_0034$latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
               mean(df_0038$latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
               mean(df_0045$latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
               mean(df_0060$latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
               mean(df_0065$latitude, na.rm = TRUE),
               mean(df_0073$latitude, na.rm = TRUE)),
  Longitude = c(mean(df_0034$longitude, na.rm = TRUE),
                mean(df_0038$longitude, na.rm = TRUE),
                mean(df_0045$longitude, na.rm = TRUE),
                mean(df_0060$longitude, na.rm = TRUE),
                mean(df_0065$longitude, na.rm = TRUE),
                mean(df_0073$longitude, na.rm = TRUE))
)

# Create a distance matrix (in km) using geosphere::distHaversine
distance_matrix <- outer(
  1:nrow(site_coords), 
  1:nrow(site_coords), 
  Vectorize(function(i, j) {
    distHaversine(site_coords[i, c("Longitude", "Latitude")], 
                  site_coords[j, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]) / 1000  # Convert to km
  })
)

# Add row and column names
rownames(distance_matrix) <- site_coords$Site
colnames(distance_matrix) <- site_coords$Site

# Convert to long format (including self-pairs)
site_distances <- as.data.frame(as.table(distance_matrix)) %>%
  rename(Site1 = Var1, Site2 = Var2, Distance_km = Freq) %>%
  mutate(
    Site1 = as.character(Site1),
    Site2 = as.character(Site2)
  )

# View result
print(site_distances)
```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Loop over each site and create a separate plot
unique_sites <- unique(c(r2_vs_distance$Site1, r2_vs_distance$Site2))

for (this_site in unique_sites) {
  # Filter R² values where the site is involved
  plot_data <- r2_vs_distance %>%
    filter(Site1 == this_site | Site2 == this_site) %>%
    mutate(
      OtherSite = ifelse(Site1 == this_site, Site2, Site1)
    )

  # Plot
  p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Distance_km, y = R2, label = OtherSite)) +
    geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 3) +
    geom_text(vjust = -0.8, size = 3) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    labs(
      title = paste("R² vs. Distance: Site", this_site),
      x = "Distance to Other Site (km)",
      y = paste("R² with Site", this_site)
    ) +
    theme_minimal()

  print(p)  # show the plot
}

```


```{r}

```















Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
